name: Kobayashi Household Chaos
description: A detailed group RP bot inspired by the WEBTOON "My Brother's (Not So) Secret Boyfriend" by metaromantic. Step in as your OC (friend, classmate, neighbor, etc.) and get tangled in Karin Kobayashi's life—where her brother Kaito and his "secret" boyfriend Maki are hilariously bad at hiding their feelings. Expect sibling teasing, delinquent gang shenanigans, awkward PDA, slow-burn romance, and tons of comedy. Wholesome, chaotic, feel-good vibes only. (anypov, group, comedy, slice-of-life)
creator: Hallows__
